title: Noida International Airport inauguration: Delhi-NCR gets new airport - all you need to know
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated Phase I of the Noida International Airport, a significant addition to India's aviation infrastructure. Developed under a PPP model, this airport aims to enhance regional and international connectivity for the NCR, easing pressure on existing facilities and supporting India's global aviation ambitions.

title: MS Dhoni ruled out, Sanju Samson to open: CSK XI revealed
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant setback as MS Dhoni is ruled out for the first two weeks of IPL 2026 due to a calf strain. In response, former CSK player Ravichandran Ashwin has unveiled his strongest playing XI, featuring Sanju Samson as wicketkeeper-opener and a balanced mix of batsmen and bowlers.

title: Government on introduction of bill related to H-1B, L-1 visa in US: Bill may hit tech workers
content: India's government has acknowledged a US Senate bill proposing significant H-1B and L-1 visa reforms. The proposed legislation aims to curb fraud and protect American jobs, potentially increasing hiring costs for US firms and impacting Indian tech professionals' ability to work and gain permanent residency in the US.

title: Candidates Chess 2026: Why are Indians not starting as favourites?
content: The Candidates tournament begins in Cyprus with American duo Nakamura and Caruana favored over Indian contenders like Praggnanandhaa. In the women's section, Divya Deshmukh is seen as a strong challenger to top seed Zhu Jiner. This event tests if India's chess dominance extends beyond Gukesh.

title: 'I will call you terrorist': Bengaluru professor abuses student in classroom
content: PES University suspended an adjunct faculty member, Muralidhar Deshpande, after a video surfaced showing him allegedly insulting a minority student. The university is verifying the video's authenticity and has initiated disciplinary proceedings. While no police complaint has been filed, authorities are awaiting the university's decision after an internal inquiry.

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang on how he manages 60 direct reportees who are mostly engineers
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang leads over sixty direct reports. He avoids one-on-one meetings, favoring collective problem-solving sessions. This approach ensures all team members receive the same information and can contribute. Huang believes in 'extreme co-design' and expects active participation. He is willing to address employees who do not contribute as expected.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' collection: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 800 crore ne
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is officially a box office phenomenon. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the high-stakes espionage thriller starring Ranveer Singh has entered its tenth day, Saturday, March 28, 2026 with record-breaking momentum. After becoming the fastest Indian film to hit the Rs. 1,000 crore global mark in just seven days, the film is now on track to become the highest-grossing Indian movie of all time. With a massive jump expected over the second weekend, trade experts predict the film will cross the Rs. 800 crore mark by Sunday, posing a direct threat to the lifetime record of the first 'Dhurandhar' which is Rs. 894.49 crore.

title: 'Payment nahi milegi ab': Babar Azam's ad shoot goes wrong; trolled heavily
content: Peshawar Zalmi captain Babar Azam faced online trolling after dropping a catch during an advertisement shoot ahead of the PSL 2026. The tournament will be played behind closed doors due to geopolitical tensions, a move Azam acknowledged will be missed by players and fans alike.

title: Middle East war: 5 Indians injured in Abu Dhabi as fire breaks out after missile interception
content: Five Indian nationals were injured on Saturday after debris from an intercepted ballistic missile fell near Abu Dhabi’s KEZAD.  The missile's destruction by air defence systems led to the unfortunate incident, with injuries reported as minor to moderate. Authorities are urging the public to rely solely on official information and refrain from spreading rumors.

title: Apple says no iPhone has been hacked when this feature is turned on
content: Apple's Lockdown Mode, a strong security feature, has successfully protected iPhones from advanced spyware for nearly four years.  Government-grade threats have not compromised devices running this mode.  Independent researchers and even some spyware tools confirm its effectiveness.  Apple continues to enhance user protection against persistent global threats.

title: Video: Speeding bike crashes into parked lorry, mother and son killed in Andhra
content: A tragic road accident in Srikakulam district claimed the lives of a mother and son. Their speeding bike collided with a stationary lorry on National Highway 16 near Chilakapalem. The duo, returning from a temple visit, died instantly at the scene.

title: 'Supreme leader no longer supreme': Trump says Mojtaba 'either dead or in bad shape'
content: President Trump asserted that Iran's leadership has collapsed and its military is severely weakened following extensive US operations. He claimed the Supreme Leader is dead and his successor is either deceased or incapacitated, stating Iran is "begging" for negotiations due to significant military degradation.

title: 'Islamic Nato' in motion? Pakistan to host Turkey, Saudi, Egypt amid Iran war
content: Pakistan is emerging as a key diplomatic force. The nation is hosting a significant meeting with Turkey, Egypt, and Saudi Arabia. This gathering aims to address regional developments, particularly the ongoing conflict involving Iran. The initiative reflects a growing alignment among these countries. Their focus is on promoting peace and stability across the Middle East.

title: Birthday party spirals into brawl over DJ song at Faridabad club
content: A birthday party in Faridabad turned violent when a dispute over music led to a group of youths assaulting a man, his daughters, and their friends. The complainant reported being attacked and robbed of valuables after intervening to protect his children. Police have registered an FIR and are examining CCTV footage.

title: Petrol, diesel prices: With ongoing war, what India's fuel situation looks like – top points
content: Petrol and diesel prices remained largely stable across major Indian cities today, despite global crude oil surges due to the US-Iran conflict. The government's excise duty cuts and strategic measures aim to shield consumers from international price volatility and ensure uninterrupted fuel supply.

title: Iranian strike on Saudi Arabia base injures 12 US troops, 2 seriously wounded
content: An Iranian strike on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia wounded at least 12 US troops, two seriously, marking a significant breach of air defenses. This attack, involving missiles and drones, damaged two KC-135 refuelling planes and adds to over 300 US service members wounded since the conflict began.

title: Strait of Hormuz disruptions: India's crude buys from Russia may double from January levels
content: Traditionally, India has sourced most of its crude from the Middle East, particularly Iraq, Saudi Arabia and the UAE, owing to geographical proximity, established contracts and reliable shipping routes.

title: Ex-Nepal PM KP Sharma Oli arrested over role in Gen Z protest crackdown
content: Former Nepal Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli and Home Minister Ramesh Lekhak were arrested in a culpable homicide case linked to the September Gen Z protests. Police acted on a commission's report recommending charges for criminal negligence, which resulted in 77 deaths and significant property damage. The arrests follow the swearing-in of new Prime Minister Balendra Shah.

title: Tiger Woods jailed: Urine test refusal, what law says, cops break silence
content: Golf legend Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge after his Land Rover overturned near his Florida home. Woods showed signs of impairment and refused a urine test, though a breathalyzer showed no alcohol. This incident follows a serious 2017 car crash that resulted in severe leg injuries.

title: Elon Musk joined Trump's call with PM Modi on Iran war earlier this week: Report
content: The conversation focused on the evolving situation in West Asia, with both leaders emphasising the importance of keeping the Strait of Hormuz open, secure and accessible. The key maritime corridor handles a significant share of global oil shipments and remains critical to international energy markets. However, it remains unclear why Musk was included in the call or whether he spoke.

title: Gurgaon shocker: Speeding Thar mows down grandfather, 2 children out on late-night walk
content: A speeding Mahindra Thar tragically killed three members of a family, including a 70-year-old man and his two young grandsons, in Gurgaon's Khor village. The victims were walking in their street late Friday evening when the vehicle struck them from behind. The driver fled the scene, leaving the car behind, and is currently absconding.

title: Indore penthouse row: 18-year-old was driving for past one year without licence
content: An 18-year-old, who recently turned of age, allegedly drove without a license for years before fatally striking a woman engineer. He and his father are in police remand as investigators reconstruct the incident, focusing on technical and eyewitness evidence. The accused reportedly assaulted residents before ramming his car into a crowd.

title: Iranians in India say families have started leaving Tehran
content: Fear grips Tehran as residents anticipate a ground assault. Ambiguous statements from Washington and threats from Tel Aviv fuel anxiety. Many families are leaving the capital for safer rural areas. Iranians in India report loved ones are rationing essentials and struggling with communication blackouts. Video calls offer brief solace amidst the uncertainty of escalating conflict.

title: E-3 Sentry explained: How US 'airborne command centre' tracks, targets and controls air wars
content: An Iranian missile and drone strike injured at least 12 American soldiers at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. The attack damaged military equipment, including refueling aircraft. This incident is a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict involving Iran, the United States, and Israel. The E-3 Sentry aircraft, crucial for air surveillance, is being phased out for newer systems.

title: 'Will never go nuclear, India can help end this war': Iran envoy
content: “Our supreme leader issued a fatwa. He said nuclear weapons are forbidden, haraam. So, we don't have it. We don't want to have it. We are not looking for it,” said Ilahi. Ending the war in West Asia depends on countries that started it, he said. He dismissed Pakistan’s claim that it was mediating between Iran and the US.

title: War to end in ‘weeks, not months’: Rubio says no need to send ground troops to Iran
content: US secretary of state Marco Rubio stated military operations against Iran are expected to conclude within weeks, not months, without ground troops. Despite ongoing conflict and disruptions to global energy supplies, Washington anticipates a response to its 15-point proposal aimed at ending the war, as Iran faces further strikes on its infrastructure.

title: At Rs 999, LPG in Adilabad 2nd priciest in country
content: Adilabad district in Telangana faces the highest LPG prices in South India at Rs 999 per cylinder, significantly impacting household budgets. This surge, attributed to local taxes and steep transportation costs, highlights a growing urban-rural divide in fuel affordability.  Across southern India, prices remain lower, with variations influenced by geography and logistics, creating sustained financial strain for consumers.

title: Ranveer Singh gifted Rs 5 crore car after 'Dhurandhar' success
content: Ranveer Singh arrived at the airport in a new GMC Hummer, following the massive success of 'Dhurandhar' and 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge'. The films have collectively earned over Rs 2,400 crore. Singh also delighted fans with a heartwarming cake-cutting interaction, further cementing his popularity.

title: IPL match today: RCB begin title defence against SRH in high-voltage clash
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru, the reigning IPL champions, face Sunrisers Hyderabad in their opening match of IPL 2026. The team aims to defend its title, a feat achieved by few. RCB's batting lineup appears strong, but bowling concerns exist due to key absences. The match at Chinnaswamy Stadium is expected to be a high-scoring contest.

title: 5 Bihar govt teachers found drunk while escorting students on Nepal tour
content: In a disturbing incident at the India-Nepal border in Supaul district, five government school teachers were detained after being suspected of intoxication while supervising students on an educational trip. Under scrutiny at the Bhimnagar checkpoint, the teachers were subjected to breath-analyser tests that confirmed their inebriation.

title: Tiger Woods arrested after car crash: DUI charge, mug shot released
content: Golf legend Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge after his Land Rover overturned near his Florida home. Woods showed signs of impairment but passed a breathalyzer test. He refused a urine analysis, leading to DUI charges, with experts suspecting medication or drug influence.

title: Bengaluru professor held for grabbing girl’s hand, trespass
content: A university faculty member is under scrutiny after reportedly making an inappropriate marriage proposal to a student during a lecture, causing significant unrest among the student body. Abdul Rehman Sharif faces serious allegations, including assault, sexual harassment, and criminal trespass, after seemingly ignoring directives to maintain distance and allegedly touching the student's hand without consent.

title: 'Ladies of the house … ': Yograj Singh's shocking remark blames wives for player retirements
content: Yograj Singh believes wives often influence players' retirement decisions, urging women to stay out of such matters. He also criticized Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma for retiring from T20Is and Tests, while surprisingly praising MS Dhoni's continued fitness and dedication, stating no one should tell him to retire.

title: Watch: US President calls it ‘Strait of Trump,’ then says it wasn’t an accident
content: US president Trump playfully referred to the Strait of Hormuz as the "Strait of Trump" during a Miami speech, drawing laughter. The comment comes amid heightened tensions over the critical oil shipping route, which Iran has the ability to disrupt. Trump's remarks align with his history of branding and a reported consideration to rename the strait.

title: Tiger arrested on suspicion of DUI after car crash
content: Tiger Woods was arrested on suspicion of DUI following a car crash Friday in which he struck another vehicle and rolled his Land Rover, authorities said.

title: Reed, Karaban handle pressure, seal UConn win
content: Tarris Reed Jr. scored 20 points, Alex Karaban added 17, and both made pressure-packed free throws in the final minute that helped second-seeded UConn hold off third-seeded Michigan State 67-63 in the Sweet 16 on Friday night.

title: Luka picks up 16th technical, faces 1-game ban
content: Luka Doncic was whistled for his 16th technical foul of the season Friday against the Nets and will face a one-game suspension if it is upheld.

title: Vols make third straight Elite 8 with upset of ISU
content: Tennessee used a dominant effort on the glass and a strong second half to put away second-seeded Iowa State 76-62 and earn its third straight trip to the Elite Eight.

title: Sources: Sun sold, will relocate to Houston in '27
content: The Connecticut Sun franchise is being sold to the Fertitta family for a record $300 million to bring the WNBA back to Houston, sources confirmed to ESPN on Friday.

title: U-M rolls on behind Lendeborg's all-around show
content: Yaxel Lendeborg did a bit of everything in a brilliant performance Friday night, putting up 23 points, 12 rebounds and seven assists to lead Michigan past Alabama 90-77 and into the Elite Eight.

title: Jackson beats buzzer, LSU to put Duke in Elite 8
content: Ashlon Jackson's 3-pointer at the buzzer lifted third-seeded Duke to an 87-85 win over No. 2 seed LSU in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA tournament Friday night.

title: Illinois curbs alcohol sales Sat. with Final 4 on line
content: Champaign officials announced an emergency order limiting alcohol sales on the Illinois campus on Saturday night in anticipation of potential property damage and excessive celebrations if the Fighting Illini beat Iowa to advance to the Final Four.

title: 🏀 What's next for eliminated women's teams
content: After Sweet 16 losses, what are the portal priorities for the Tigers Gophers, Tar Heels and Commodores?

title: Men's March Madness 2026: Ranking the remaining eight teams

content: Detroit is running out of time to climb back into a playoff spot. Plus, full postseason bracket projections.

title: 'Nobody has seen the best in Vladdy yet': How a dominant October took Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to a new level
content: Toronto's slugger proved he was a superstar in the playoffs, but it was in his leadership that he really stepped up. Now, the hope is that carries over to 2026 -- and beyond.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

content: Based on a simple combination of ability and tactical importance, we've reranked the best players in order at the Big Six Premier League clubs.

title: How Hodgson's 44-year coaching gap at one club compares to others in soccer, NFL, NBA
content: Roy Hodgson is returning to Bristol City as their interim manager, 44 years after they hired him the first time.

title: This is the deepest USMNT squad maybe ever. Is it enough for the best World Cup result ever?
content: World Cup-winning teams need more than their starting 11, but the U.S. men's national team never had enough good bench options. Maybe that has finally changed?

title: A former NFL GM's must-draft board for 2026: Tannenbaum pounds the table for 14 prospects
content: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

title: Lehigh Valley IronPigs poke fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal in rehab promo
content: The Philadelphia Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

title: 'The KING ... Shot by ME': Caitlin Clark photographs LeBron James at Lakers-Pacers
content: The Fever star was behind the lens as a credentialed photographer at Wednesday's Lakers-Pacers matchup.

content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

content: The UFL comes out swinging in Columbus, Louisville and Birmingham with familiar college stars as coaches.

content: Wales scrapped for every inch of the pitch against Bosnia and Herzegovina, but in the end, it wasn't enough to save their World Cup dream.

title: World Cup playoff preview, predictions: Who will book the final six spots?
content: The final six spots -- four from Europe and two from the intercontinental playoff -- will be clinched this week.

title: AUSL surprises NiJaree Canady with its first 'golden ticket'
content: The Athletes Unlimited Softball League has given out its first ticket -- presented by Kim Ng and Patrick Mahomes.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Could bumper new Atlético deal keep Álvarez away from Arsenal, Barça?
content: Julián Álvarez has been linked with Arsenal and Barcelona, but Atlético Madrid are preparing a big pay day to keep him. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Noida International Airport Inauguration LIVE: PM Modi Launches Noida Airport In A Big Boost For Delhi-NCR Connectivity
content: Noida Jewar International Airport Inauguration LIVE Updates: PM Modi on Friday shared photographs of the Noida International Airport at Jewar, Uttar Pradesh, highlighting its significance for regional connectivity.

title: "Epstein Island" Tag Appears On White House Number Due To Google Glitch
content: The issue was reported on Android devices, particularly Google Pixel phones, while iPhone users saw no name at all.

title: Noida Airport's First Phase Launched. When Will First Flight Take Off?
content: Officials say operations will begin with limited domestic flights in the initial phase, likely during daytime hours, before gradually expanding to full-scale domestic and international services.

title: Fog-Ready Runway, 10-Minute Check-In: All About Noida International Airport
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate the much-awaited Noida International Airport at Jewar, Uttar Pradesh today.

title: AIADMK's Women Push In 2nd Poll Candidates' List As EPS Eyes Comeback
content: Of the 127 candidates announced in this phase, 29 are sitting MLAs, 26 are former legislators, and five are ex-MPs - reflecting a conscious attempt to balance continuity with change.

content: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in the first wave of strikes by the US and Israel.

content: The victim, Srinivas Tandle, owner of multiple garment stores, had taken up cycling for fitness on the very day of the accident.

content: The war in the Middle East began when the US and Israel conducted strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and other senior leaders.

title: Pre-Wedding Shoot At Karnataka Temple Turns Violent, Photographers Allegedly Wore Shoes
content: During the shoot, a confrontation broke out when some individuals objected to photography within the temple premises and photographers wearing footwear.

title: "Eager To Work Closely": Nepal PM Balen Shah Thanks PM Modi For Greetings
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Friday extended wishes to Balendra 'Balen' Shah on his swearing-in as Nepal's Prime Minister.

title: Prime Minister To Ouster To Arrest: Rise And Fall Of KP Sharma Oli
content: KP Oli was arrested on Saturday morning, one day after the country's new prime minister took office, following the defeat of the 74-year-old's bid for a political comeback in elections earlier this month.

title: 'Bibi Really Sold It': A Rebuke In Vance-Netanyahu Tense Call Amid Iran War
content: Another senior US official told Axios that, in their view, Vance remained the most viable path to a negotiated end to the war. "If the Iranians can't strike a deal with Vance, they don't get a deal. He's the best they're gonna get," the official said

title: "Sharm Nahi Aati...Terrorist": Bengaluru Professor's Outburst Against Student
content: According to accounts and a video recording from the classroom, Dr Muralidhar Deshpande reacted aggressively, allegedly calling the student a "terrorist" in front of the class.

title: Will Bengal Witness Close Fights Or Decisive Wins? What Past 2 Polls Show
content: Data from the last two elections show that Bengal is moving towards more decisive results, with a growing share of seats being won by large margins.

title: "Either Dead Or In Very Bad Shape": Trump On Mojtaba Khamenei
content: After Iran's supreme leader Ali Khamenei was killed in strikes on February 28, Tehran announced that his son, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, had been named as his successor.

title: "I Really Believe I Am A Peacemaker": Trump On His Legacy
content: Donald Trump reiterated his claim that he helped stop eight wars, including those between Armenia and Azerbaijan; the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Rwanda; Cambodia and Thailand; Egypt and Ethiopia; Serbia and Kosovo; Israel and Hamas.

title: US Troops Injured At Saudi Base, Iran's Nuclear Sites Hit As War Enters 2nd Month
content: The attack on Prince Sultan Air Base also damaged several US refueling aircraft, said two American officials.

content: Most conflict analysis explains what just happened. Wargaming does something different. Before events occur, you define the specific observable signals that will tell you which war you are actually watching - so that when something happens, you are r

content: Within the first ten days, open-source assessments suggest that between 60 and 90 per cent of Iran's MRBM inventory had been fired or destroyed.

title: PM Modi lacks courage to oppose Israel's actions in West Bank: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh
content: “The current West Asia war is providing cover for Israel to move ahead on its vision of Greater Israel and also finishing off any hope for a Palestinian state,” Jairam Ramesh said

title: PM Modi inaugurates Noida International Airport
content: Civil Aviation Minister K. Ram Mohan Naidu said that Noida International Airport will be developed as an aerotropolis and not just an airport.

title: Five killed, 30 injured as tourist bus overturns in Odisha’s Nayagarh
content: Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi announced ₹4 lakh ex gratia from the Chief Minister's Relief Fund (CMRF) for the next of kin of the deceased

title: Election Commission publishes second supplementary voter list in Bengal
content: Booth-wise lists were made available on the ECI website around 11:30 p.m. on March 27, but the web pages containing data about deletions or inclusions could not be accessed due to some “technical glitches”, an official said

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: ECI publishes second supplementary voter list in Bengal
content: The commission had released the first supplementary list of 'Under Adjudication' voters on March 23, but remained tight-lipped on the number of deletions or the precise figure of cases disposed of on that list, drawing criticism from various quarters.

title: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy conveys his resolve to go ahead with Musi development
content: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy said a mosque is scheduled to be constructed at Charminar, besides Gurdwara at Sikh Chawni in Gowliguda and church on the Nagole-Uppal stretch

title: Amit Shah to release BJP's list of charges against TMC on March 28
content: The ‘charge sheet’ will highlight the alleged “failures” of the TMC Government across 14 sectors, the BJP leader said

title: Government revises PM e-DRIVE scheme, sets new deadlines for e-scooters, e-rickshaws
content: Under PM e-DRIVE, the maximum number of registered vehicles to be supported has been capped at 24,79,120 for electric two-wheelers and 39,034 for e-rickshaws and e-carts

title: The Transgender Persons Amendment Bill and the question of identity: Who gets to define a trans life?
content: As India tightens its transgender law, love, desire, and dating apps reveal how trans people are still asked for proof before acceptance

title: T.N. Assembly election: parties must avoid excessive freebies, focus on development, says AIADMK leader Semmalai
content: Contending that these handouts being announced as part of electoral promises by major parties will not facilitate T.N.’s development, he criticises the DMK government for not increasing the capital expenditure substantially over the last 5 years and ‘frittering away’ funds for distributing freebies

title: Watch: Why Seemalai believes that the AIADMK alliance will perform well in the TN Assmebly elections
content: AIADMK’s senior leader and former Education and Health Minister S. Semmalai on Saturday (March 21, 2026) called upon political parties to avoid rolling out a slew of freebies

title: Sri Lankan journalist and The Hindu franchisee K.V.S. Mohan passes away
content: Mr. Mohan was the founder-editor of Kadambam, one of Sri Lanka’s earliest Tamil magazines, launched in 1959, and ran it for over three decades

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Pinarayi pandering to minority and majority communalism to gain a few votes, says Satheesan
content: The Leader of the Opposition alleges that the CM, who had resorted to minority appeasement during the Lok Sabha elections, has quickly changed tack to majority appeasement

title: T.N. government releases draft State Mental Healthcare Regulations, 2026
content: The Tamil Nadu State Mental Health Authority will maintain a register of practising mental health professionals in the State that will be updated monthly. It also proposes to publish a district-wise list of mental health professionals on January 1 every year

title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
content: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

title: Anger on the banks of the Musi
content: With the Telangana government ready to implement the Musi Riverfront Development Project in Hyderabad, residents along the river are facing possible displacement and uncertainty over compensation. The Moosa and Esi tributaries, once seasonal streams, now flow with sewage and industrial effluents, raising questions about ecological restoration. Swathi Vadlamudi speaks to citizens and environmentalists

title: Family of three from Warangal killed in road accident near Chittoor
content: The car rammed into a stationary bus; preliminary report said that overspeeding and possible driver fatigue were key factors

content: A key highlight was the extensive use of advanced simulators and modern training infrastructure, enabling realistic, scenario-based learning and enhancing operational readiness in complex maritime situations

title: Critical shortage of human resources in Kerala force Ob-gyn specialists to play it safe
content: They have decided to refrain from conducting deliveries in public hospitals that lack adequate human resources, facilities and infrastructure

title: Service sector fuels Telangana’s explosive per capita income growth in 10 years
content: Though Telangana witnessed a sharp rise in per capita income led by districts like Mahabubnagar and Rangareddy, the gains remain uneven with most districts lagging behind the State average, highlighting persistent regional disparities despite strong service-led economic growth across the State

title: Mirwaiz-led delegation visits Iranian embassy in Delhi, expresses condolences over killing of Khamenei, his family members
content: The delegation also expressed “serious concern and condemned the ongoing war imposed on Iran by Israel and the United States”

title: Karnataka sets up State-level panel to strengthen palliative care services
content: The decision, notified in a Government Order dated March 23, follows a proposal from the Health Department highlighting the need for structured technical guidance and coordinated efforts to expand palliative care.

title: Govt. notifies TRP-2026; tightens audit norms, expands sample size
content: Under the new policy, the net-worth requirement for a company willing to register as TV rating agency has been reduced from existing ₹20 crore to ₹5 crore

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Wildlife incursion, a vote-catcher issue in many constituencies
content: Wildlife attacks have claimed many lives and ruined farmers financially. So affected are the farmers that they have fielded a candidate in Kozhikode against the State Forest Minister. They are seeking the views of candidates across all constituencies regarding conflict mitigation plans. In at least one-fourth of the constituencies in the State, it is the main topic of electioneering

title: BJD demands VAT reduction on petrol, diesel in Odisha
content: BJD spokesperson Lenin Mohanty said the ongoing conflict involving Israel, the United States and Iran has triggered concerns of a global fuel crisis

content: The situation turned volatile after an altercation during the procession escalated into violence, with both sides throwing stones at each other and vandalising property in the area

title: 5 India-bound LPG ships stay anchored near Hormuz Strait
content: Appearing to bunch together so they can troop out of the strait, these ships carry more than 1.7 lakh tonnes of LPG

title: Chhattisgarh High Court says signs, gestures are oral evidence, upholds conviction of man for raping disabled woman
content: Court observes that the trial court had adopted demonstrative methods, including the use of a plastic doll, to remove any possibility of misunderstanding in the survivor’s testimony

title: ECI suspends police officer for failing to tackle BJP-Trinamool Congress clashes
content: The poll panel described it as "serious negligence and dereliction of duty" on the part of the officer.

title: Candidates take offbeat route to connect with voters in Bengal
content: From kitchen visits to barber shop stunts, candidates across parties attempt unconventional voter connect ahead of the West Bengal Legislative Assembly election

title: Trade deal with India not far-off, but there are still gaps: U.S. official
content: One of the gaps in India-U.S. discussions, as per the U.S. official, is around pulses, with India seeking to safeguard the market for this agricultural commodity and the U.S. wanting greater access to it

title: NIA granted 45-day extension in Red Fort blast probe
content: The NIA, in its plea, cited the need for further investigation in light of the recent arrests of Zamir Ahmed Ahangar and Tufail Ahmad Bhat

title: IIT Guwahati team develops energy-efficient bricks
content: The researchers said these bricks have been designed to keep buildings naturally cool, offering a solution for sustainable construction

title: ED charges ex-RCOM executive Punit Garg in ₹40,000-crore bank loan fraud case
content: Chargesheet also names Vaishali Jairam Mane as an accused, for her alleged involvement in the purchase of a luxury Manhattan apartment from the proceeds of the crime

title: Stronger trade corridors and supply chains needed, says Jaishankar
content: External Affairs Minister stresses importance of resilient trade corridors, such as the IMEC, especially amidst uncertainties of West Asian conflict; calls for freedom of navigation to ensure global economic security

title: People spreading rumours on lockdown will be booked: CM Fadnavis
content: He emphasised that we have enough stock of petrol and diesel to last for a month and appealed to citizens not to line up outside the petrol pump

title: T.N. Assembly election: EC orders State government to post new SPs for 4 districts, including Kancheepuram
content: It adds that the officers transferred out must not be posted in any poll-related posts till the completion of the election

title: Farmer held on murder charges in Tirupattur
content: Police said the arrested farmer was a resident of Athur Kuppam village near Natrampalli town in the district

title: Karnataka bypolls: Congress rebel candidate retires from contest in Davangere South
content: Rebel candidate Sadiq Pahilwan announced that he would extend full support to Congress candidate Samarth Mallikarjun, son of Minister S.S. Mallikarjun

title: Karnataka High Court quashes FIR against Sri Sri Ravishankar on land encroachment allegations
content: There is not even an iota of allegation against the petitioner for land grabbing or encroachment, observes Justice M. Nagaprasanna

title: T.N. Assembly election: AIADMK fields new face in Sengottaiyan’s stronghold of Gobichettipalayam
content: V.B. Prabhu, who joined the party in 2002, rose through the ranks to serve as deputy secretary of the party’s student wing for a decade. Over the past six months, he was the West Union secretary in the constituency

title: TVK chief Vijay accuses Chennai police, officials of denying permission for his Perambur campaign
content: “Every time I plan an election campaign, the DMK government continues to delay or deny permission citing various reasons,” he stated.

title: Colitis & Crohn’s Foundation launches Tamil Nadu chapter to boost IBD awareness
content: CCFI noted a higher prevalence of Crohn’s disease in southern India, with paediatric cases accounting for nearly 10% of the disease burden in Tamil Nadu

title: T.N. Assembly election: AIADMK releases second list of candidates, retains 30 sitting legislators
content: Prominent among those who did not figure in the list are former Ministers V. Saroja, V.M. Rajalakshmi, Vaigaichelvan, and ‘Mafoi’ K. Pandiarajan, all of whom lost in the 2021 election

title: 5 killed as avalanche hits Srinagar-Leh National Highway
content: Officials said the avalanche hit the Srinagar-Leh national highway near Zero Point at the Zojila Pass in the afternoon and buried some vehicles

title: ‘Bibi sold it as easy’: Inside JD Vance's 'tough' call with Netanyahu

title: Expert's picks: Will Fundora's size be enough against Thurman's power?
